title: Super Mario Flash - Born to Be Wild (Hold Right)
description:
THIS LEVEL ONLY WORKS WITH LUIGI!!!!
Play this level here! - http://www.pouetpu-games.com/index.php?section=4&id=6132
This is a Super Mario Flash level that I made, called "Born to Be Wild." A painstaking 4 hours of careful planning went into the making of this level! This is my first (and only) hold right level so far. If you would like to play this level, click on this link in the description and you can play this level as well as my other levels.
